content:
Looks like the bot found a pretty broken configuration.

  • error[E0560]: struct blk_mq_tag_set has no field named ops
  • error[E0432]: unresolved import core::sync::atomic::AtomicU64
  • error[E0609]: no field dev on type drm_gem_object
  • error[E0609]: no field id_table on type i2c_driver
  • error[E0609]: no field release on type bindings::device
  • error[E0609]: no field dev on type drm_gem_object

And several more: click to see them

While trying to reproduce the issue on a 64-bit machine, I run into the error below. What am I missing?

  • clang version 21.1.5 (Fedora 21.1.5-1.fc43)
  • rustc 1.91.0 (f8297e351 2025-10-28) (Fedora 1.91.0-1.fc43)
git checkout e4addc7cc2dfcc19f1c8c8e47f3834b22cb21559
wget -O .config https://download.01.org/0day-ci/archive/20251121/202511211008.jgLuTcrQ-lkp@intel.com/config
make -j $(nproc) LLVM=1 CLIPPY=1 ARCH=um olddefconfig
make -j $(nproc) LLVM=1 CLIPPY=1 ARCH=um -k

  CLIPPY L rust/kernel.o
error[E0432]: unresolved imports `core::sync::atomic::AtomicI64`, `core::sync::atomic::AtomicU64`
  --> rust/kernel/debugfs/traits.rs:17:27
   |
17 |     AtomicI16, AtomicI32, AtomicI64, AtomicI8, AtomicIsize, AtomicU16, AtomicU32, AtomicU64,
   |                           ^^^^^^^^^ no `AtomicI64` in `sync::atomic`              ^^^^^^^^^ no `AtomicU64` in `sync::atomic`
   |
help: a similar name exists in the module
   |
17 -     AtomicI16, AtomicI32, AtomicI64, AtomicI8, AtomicIsize, AtomicU16, AtomicU32, AtomicU64,
17 +     AtomicI16, AtomicI32, AtomicI32, AtomicI8, AtomicIsize, AtomicU16, AtomicU32, AtomicU64,
   |
help: a similar name exists in the module
   |
17 -     AtomicI16, AtomicI32, AtomicI64, AtomicI8, AtomicIsize, AtomicU16, AtomicU32, AtomicU64,
17 +     AtomicI16, AtomicI32, AtomicI64, AtomicI8, AtomicIsize, AtomicU16, AtomicU32, AtomicU32,
   |

error[E0560]: struct `bindings::drm_gem_object_funcs` has no field named `vmap`
   --> rust/kernel/drm/gem/mod.rs:210:9
    |
210 |         vmap: None,
    |         ^^^^ `bindings::drm_gem_object_funcs` does not have this field
    |
    = note: available fields are: `kernel_vmap`

error: aborting due to 2 previous errors

Some errors have detailed explanations: E0432, E0560.
For more information about an error, try `rustc --explain E0432`.
